name: Daito Koun Co.,Ltd.
summary: Daito Koun Co.,Ltd. operates as a logistics company in Japan. The company engages in the port transportation, transportation, warehousing, customs clearance, freight car transportation, packing, waste collecting, food freezing and refrigeration, worker dispatch, and non-life insurance agency businesses. It is also involved in the import/export and sale of various goods; and leasing of real estate properties. The company was formerly known as Tatsumi Shipping Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Daito Koun Co.,Ltd. in January 1961. Daito Koun Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1957 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
